title: cryptogramma crispa var. acrostichoides
intro: Cryptogramma crispa var. acrostichoides, also known as the rock fern or mountain rock fern, is a species of fern in the family Adiantaceae. It is a type of perennial plant that grows in rocky areas and is native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of rock fern include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption.
